---
image: media/lake_ski.jpeg
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 25em
  links: # create buttons
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sspisak@macalester.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sophia-spisak-b62376256/
      target: _blank
---

\
\
\

Hi! I'm Sophia Spisak. I'm a junior at Macalester College in St. Paul, MN, majoring in Geography with minors in Geospatial Science and Data Science. 

Please see my [About](about.qmd) page to learn more. My [Projects](projects.qmd) page includes both academic and non-academic work, and my [Resources](resources.qmd) page includes materials that have been helpful in learning how to build this website. Thanks for visiting!
